acquisition_contract_for_v2_12c.purpose: Acquire official HKEX List of Securities file as raw bytes.
acquisition_contract_for_v2_12c.allowed_in_v2_12c: HTTP GET raw XLSX, preserve exact bytes, compute SHA256, record metadata.
acquisition_contract_for_v2_12c.prohibited_in_v2_12c: No parsing decision, no normalization, no net-new filtering, no rebuild, no scoring.
acquisition_contract_for_v2_12c.raw_preservation_policy: Save raw XLSX exactly as received under raw/hkex_v2_12c/.

acquisition_contract_for_v2_12c.purpose: Acquire official Securities Lists page for provenance and fallback link discovery.
acquisition_contract_for_v2_12c.allowed_in_v2_12c: HTTP GET raw HTML, preserve exact bytes, compute SHA256, record metadata and discovered candidate links.
acquisition_contract_for_v2_12c.prohibited_in_v2_12c: No brittle scraping, no table parsing for accepted rows, no rebuild.
acquisition_contract_for_v2_12c.raw_preservation_policy: Save raw HTML exactly as received under raw/hkex_v2_12c/.

acquisition_contract_for_v2_12c.purpose: Optional fallback/provenance file if English XLSX acquisition fails or schema comparison is needed.
acquisition_contract_for_v2_12c.allowed_in_v2_12c: Download only if explicit fallback branch is triggered by acquisition script; preserve raw bytes.
acquisition_contract_for_v2_12c.prohibited_in_v2_12c: No mixing English/Chinese rows into accepted source during acquisition.
acquisition_contract_for_v2_12c.raw_preservation_policy: Save as separate fallback raw file and mark fallback status in manifest.

acquisition_contract_for_v2_12c.url_or_discovery_rule: Derived from official XLSX only; do not assume every row is ordinary equity.
acquisition_contract_for_v2_12c.purpose: Prevent incorrect inclusion of ETFs, REITs, warrants, debt, derivatives, structured products or non-equity instruments.
acquisition_contract_for_v2_12c.allowed_in_v2_12c: Record source fields exactly and preserve raw workbook.
acquisition_contract_for_v2_12c.prohibited_in_v2_12c: No accepted filtering, no equity classification decision, no rebuild.

acquisition_contract_for_v2_12c.url_or_discovery_rule: Preserve stock codes exactly as text, including leading zeros.
acquisition_contract_for_v2_12c.purpose: Avoid losing leading zeros and avoid ticker-key collisions.
acquisition_contract_for_v2_12c.allowed_in_v2_12c: Store metadata and raw workbook only.
acquisition_contract_for_v2_12c.prohibited_in_v2_12c: No conversion of stock_code to integer.
acquisition_contract_for_v2_12c.raw_preservation_policy: Raw workbook is source of truth.

validation_questions_for_v2_12d.question: Does HKEX ListOfSecurities.xlsx remain directly downloadable?
Which workbook sheet contains the actual securities table?
Does the workbook contain stock code, name of securities, category, sub-category, board lot, currency and ISIN?
How many rows exist before filtering?
How many rows are ordinary equities versus ETFs, REITs, warrants, debt, derivatives or other instruments?
How many candidate identifiers are net-new against expanded_universe_v2_11e?
Can HKEX rows be normalized conservatively without brittle scraping?
Does HKEX materially reduce the 19,646-row gap to 50k?
Should HKEX be source provider, candidate provider, enrichment, reference-only or deferred?
